title: OTP Screen - Verify back navigation to Login screen
description: Tests that the back button on the OTP screen navigates the user to the Login screen.
preconditions: User is on the OTP screen.

steps.description: 1. Tap the Back Button (arrow icon) on the top left of the OTP screen.
3. Verify the phone number input field on the Login screen still contains the previously entered number.

expected_result: User is navigated back to the Login screen, and the previously entered phone number is preserved in the input field.
